headline: IBM’s New AI Units And Services Reshape Enterprise Consulting Story
summary: IBM (NYSE:IBM) introduced a new Forward Deployed Units model, creating senior-led pods that combine consultants and AI agents for on-site client delivery. The company also launched two managed AI services on IBM Cloud, Red Hat AI Inference and OpenShift Virtualization, aimed at supporting real-time AI deployment and secure virtualization. These moves reflect IBM's focus on reinforcing its consulting and cloud delivery model around practical enterprise AI use cases. For investors watching...

headline: Can IBM's Advanced AI and Virtualization Offerings Boost Its Shares?
summary: IBM rolls out two new IBM Cloud managed services, Red Hat AI Inference and OpenShift Virtualization, to speed AI adoption and secure virtual workloads.

headline: Cisco surges on Q3 AI demand, while cutting 4,000 jobs in AI overhaul
summary: Cisco Systems (CSCO) stock has surged by double-digits since reporting fiscal third quarter results in Wednesday's extended hours, topping Wall Street expectations with revenue of $15.84 billion and adjusted earnings of $1.06 per share. This comes after the cloud operator laid off 4,000 workers as part of a new AI-focused restructuring. Hennion & Walsh CIO Kevin Mahn and Yahoo Finance Senior Reporters Ines Ferré and Brooke DiPalma take a closer look at the AI demand propelling Cisco, the cloud operator's outlook, and its recent job cuts.

headline: Three Decades of Delivering Excellence: Damco Solutions Celebrates 30 Years with Record Growth and the Velocity Theme at Its Core
summary: PRINCETON, N.J. & DUBAI, United Arab Emirates, May 14, 2026--Damco Solutions celebrated its 30th anniversary, endearingly termed Damco Day, with record growth and the Velocity theme at its core.

headline: A New Way to Make AI Actually Work in the Real World
summary: Enterprise AI is at a tipping point. The investment is massive and experimentation is everywhere but deploying quickly remains a challenge. The issue is not the vision nor the technology. It is the operating model.

raw.headline: A New Way to Make AI Actually Work in the Real World
